response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to AI and fintech, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and engineering leadership at the required scale.
strengths: Experienced in multiple programming languages and technologies
Proven track record of developing complex software systems
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
concerns: Lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and multi-agent systems
No clear evidence of experience in fintech infrastructure or regulated environments
Not clear if they have experience scaling engineering teams to the required size

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI
Experience in software development and testing
